trait.confidence_notes: GWAS is sex-combined; dosage-compensation assumptions are not explicit. eQTL follow-up completed for rsID-addressable loci; some loci lacked a usable rsID.
trait.eqtl_lookup_note: eQTL follow-up completed for rsID-addressable loci; some loci lacked a usable rsID.
trait.category: UK Biobank Assessment Centre > Touchscreen > Lifestyle and environment > Smoking
trait.description_more: ACE touchscreen question "In the past, how often have you smoked tobacco?" ~F1249~ was collected from all participants except those who indicated they currently smoke on most or all days, as defined by their answers to ~F1239~
